title: Lead Investment Banker at SBI Life Insurance

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at SBI Life Insurance
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Investment Banker with drive and ambition, SBI Life Insurance in Bengaluru is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About SBI Life Insurance:
SBI Life Insurance is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SBI Life Insurance!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
